Salesforce partnered with Equinix to build private network for Data 360 product across 14 countries; Agentforce AI platform gaining traction; Q1 FY2027 results expected Aug 27.

Apple to broadcast first major live sports event shot entirely on 15 iPhones (MLS); tariff risks on China-manufactured products being monitored; FY2026 Q2 results May 1 2026 beat expectations.
Nutanix FY2026 Q3 results May 2026; strong multi-cloud hybrid infrastructure demand; S&P upgraded outlook to Positive on improved FCF profile and declining leverage.
Broadcom rated A- by S&P with Positive outlook (Jan 2026); $73B AI-related backlog; EBITDA leverage ~1.6x; FY2025 AI semiconductor revenue +65% YoY to $20B; infrastructure software growing ~50%.
HP Inc Q2 FY2026 results May 2026; PC demand supported by AI PC refresh cycle; tariff exposure on China supply chain being managed via geographic diversification.
HPE Q2 FY2026 (Jun 1) record beat: revenue +40% YoY to $10.7B, EPS +108%; FY2026 guidance sharply raised to $3.35-$3.45 EPS and $3.5B+ FCF; AI server orders $2.1B; stock surged ~28% post-earnings.
Dell Q1 FY2027 (May 2026) results beat; AI-optimized server orders strong per Seeking Alpha; ISG segment revenue surging; FY2027 guidance reinforced on AI infrastructure demand.
Nextracker has no debt and $845M+ cash; record backlog >$5B; formed Nextracker Arabia JV with Abunayyan in Saudi Arabia; FY2026 revenue guided $13.7-14.3B; IRA 45X credits providing margin support.
Sanmina Q2 FY2026 revenue $4.01B (beat); ZT Systems AI compute shipments accelerated; Board authorized $600M share repurchase; FY2026 revenue raised to $13.7-14.3B range.
Announced spin-off of data center EMS business (~$6.6Bn revenue) and acquisition of Electrical Power Products. S&P affirmed BBB-/Stable May 6 2026; pro forma leverage expected to remain below 3x.
Jabil Q3 FY2026 results expected Jun 26; data center/AI segment driving revenue mix shift; divested mobility business improving margins; FY2026 guidance maintained.

Arrow Electronics Q1 2026 beat; ECS segment benefited from 4 extra shipping days; Global Components performing at or above seasonal trends; analyst community holds Underperform consensus with lower price targets.
Avnet navigating electronic components cycle recovery; Neutral analyst consensus with modest upside targets; semiconductor distribution demand improving in 2026 on AI hardware build-out.
TD Synnex Q2 FY2026 results expected Jun 24; Outperform analyst consensus; AI PC and server refresh driving IT distribution demand in 2026; revenue growth guidance above sector peers.

CDW Q1 2026 earnings reported; IT solutions demand supported by AI infrastructure refresh; Buy analyst consensus; government IT spending remains a risk factor given federal budget uncertainty.

Cognizant Q1 2026 results beat; GenAI services bookings accelerating; reaffirmed full-year 2026 revenue growth guidance; acquisition of Belcan engineering services integrating on track.
